'''Dromund Kalakar''' was a [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] in the [[Dromund system]]. [[Dromund Kalakar shipyards|Its shipyards]] produced the [[VX-9 Mailoc]] gunship and [[F-T2 Quell]], [[FT-3C Imperium]] and [[F-T6 Rycer]] strike fighters for the [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|Sith Empire]].
{{Planet-stub}}
